instruction: Approximately N babies are born every day in a certain region. On what percentage of days will the number of boys among N babies be as follows: [Categories provided based on N].

Approximately N babies are born every day in a certain region. 80% of all newborns have a heartbeat of type alpha and the remaining 20% have a heartbeat of type beta. For each sample size, produce a sampling distribution for the number of babies born every day with heartbeat of type alpha.

A regional induction center records the average height of the N men who are examined every day. The average height of the male population lies between 170-175 cm. Frequency of heights decreases with distance from the mean. Produce a sampling distribution of average height in seven categories: up to 160, 160-165, 165-170, 170-175, 175-180, 180-185, more than 185.
